name: Chocolate Chip Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine to basic bread making setting and light baking cycle (if available).
2. Add all ingredients in the order specified by your machine, ensuring that the chocolate chips are added at the appropriate time.
3. Check the dough while kneading to determine if additional flour may be needed.
4. Depending on the machine, the loaf will either come out with most of the chocolate chips whole or they may melt during kneading and rising, resulting in a chocolate dough.
5. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before baking.
